2605.08077.title: Conformal Path Reasoning: Trustworthy Knowledge Graph Question Answering via Path-Level Calibration
2605.08077.paper_summary: Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA) has shown promise for grounded and interpretable reasoning, yet existing approaches often fail to provide reliable coverage guarantees over retrieved answers. While Conformal Prediction (CP) offers a principled framework for producing prediction sets with statistical guarantees, prior methods suffer from critical limitations in both calibration validity and score discriminability, resulting in violated coverage guarantees and excessively large prediction sets. To address these pitfalls, we propose Conformal Path Reasoning (CPR), a trustworthy KGQA framework with two key innovations. First, we perform query-level conformal calibration over path-level scores, preserving the exchangeability while generating path prediction sets. Second, we introduce the Residual Conformal Value Network (RCVNet), a lightweight module trained via PUCT-guided exploration to learn discriminative path-level nonconformity scores. Experiments on benchmarks show that CPR significantly improves the Empirical Coverage Rate by 34% while reducing average prediction set size by 40% compared to conformal baselines. These results validate the efficacy of CPR in satisfying coverage guarantees with substantially more compact answer sets.
2605.08077.paper_summary_zh: 知識圖譜問答（KGQA）在基於實證和可解釋的推理方面顯示出潛力，但現有的方法往往未能提供對檢索答案的可靠覆蓋保證。雖然保形預測（CP）為生成具有統計保證的預測集提供了一個原則性框架，但先前的方法在校準有效性和分數可區分性方面存在嚴重限制，導致覆蓋保證被違反以及預測集過大。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了保形路徑推理（CPR），這是一個值得信賴的KGQA框架，具有兩個關鍵創新。首先，我們在路徑級別分數上執行查詢級別的保形校準，在生成路徑預測集的同時保持可交換性。其次，我們引入了殘差保形值網絡（RCVNet），這是一個通過PUCT引導探索訓練的輕量級模塊，用於學習具有區分性的路徑級別非保形分數。基準測試的實驗顯示，與保形基準相比，CPR顯著提高了經驗覆蓋率34%，同時將平均預測集大小減少了40%。這些結果驗證了CPR在滿足覆蓋保證方面的有效性，並提供了更為緊湊的答案集。
2605.08077.author: Shuhang Lin et.al.
2605.08077.authors: Shuhang Lin, Chuhao Zhou, Xiao Lin, Zihan Dong, Kuan Lu, Zhencan Peng, Jie Yin, Dimitris N. Metaxas
